dialogos.texto_en: Oh, do you hear something?\nIs there an event going on?
Yeah, that building over there\nis the facility for the dolphin show.\nIt looks like they're doing it now.
What should we do? Do you want to go see it?
No, it seems like we'll just catch the end of it\nif we go now, so let's skip it.
I see.\nThen%p-2;――
There should be a place nearby where sea turtles\nand manatees are on display.\nAlso, there's an esplanade along the coast.
Hmm, I see. Actually, I don't really feel like\ndoing anything in particular right now.\nJust being with you like this makes me happy.
But it's a waste if we don't do anything, right?\nNow that we are here, just tell me\nif you want to do something.
Is anything okay, really?
If it's something we can do.\nDon't come up with anything too fancy, okay?
You don't have to be so cautious.\nI just want to walk with our arms linked, that's all.
We haven't done that since we started going out,\nhave we?
That's what you want?
Yeah.\nFor you, Futaro, it might not be a big deal,\nbut for me, it's important.
(However, now that Nino mentioned it,\n we never have walked arm in arm as lovers, have we.)
Got it.\nIt's not like I owe you anything,\nbut today feel free to tell me what you want to do.
Okay!\nThanks, Futaro.
There's an esplanade up ahead, right?\nLet's go check it out.
Okay.
Now that you mention it...\nWe haven't really done that, have we?
Even though we're dating,\nwe were busy with exams\nand didn't go out on many dates.
Ahh...\nBut, trying to do it now...
Is it embarrassing?
Yeah, but if you want to do it,\nthere's no reason for me to refuse.
Thanks, Futaro.
There's an esplanade up ahead, right?\nLet's go check it out.
Okay.
This alright?
What's wrong, Nino?
W-well, I was just surprised\nthat you didn't hesitate, Futaro.
You're the one who made the request...
I mean...
But I'm happy about it.\nThanks, Futaro.
There's an esplanade up ahead, right?\nLet's go check it out.
Okay.
The scenery is just like a painting...
Y-yeah.
The sea looks beautiful even from here.
For sure.
(No good, I'm thinking too hard about Nino.\n I want to naturally link arms with her...)
Futaro?
Wh-what's up?
Um... Are you nervous?
Straight up? Yeah.\nEven though we're just arm-in-arm.
Teehee, actually, me too.\nI'm more interested in you than the scenery.
Yeah, same here.\nDespite it being a rare view we don't see often.
Someday, I wonder if we'll be able to walk\nwithout being nervous.
I'll probably keep staring at you like this forever.
At least face forward, or you'll trip.
Oh, but then you'll be there to support me, right?
Got it.\nGeez, you act like it's normal.
Teehee!\nWell, I know that you're a kind person, Futaro.
